title: NEW CHARACTERS FAN CLUB HERE YOROSHIKU __
display_title: NEW CHARACTERS FAN CLUB HERE YOROSHIKU __
wikitext:
[]: [SPOILERS] NEW CHARACTERS FAN CLUB HERE YOROSHIKU ^__^             Quote Post by Xard » Sun Nov 18, 2012 4:24 pm Welcome to the superfabulously spermspergtastic fanclub for all the new Eva characters! Who could've thought such luxurious addition of characters would become reality one day? In here we celebrate new characters and name [s]the best eva girl[/s] our favourite new characters, post art of them etc. I'm assuming the title of President Admiral of Green League . Why Green League? Because we all know who the best girl is! [URL=http://imageshack.us/photo/my-images/546/evamidorifascinating.png/] [/URL] [URL=http://imageshack.us/photo/my-images/210/evamidorikitakami.png/] [/URL] Deconstruction of the greenhead genre Keep the love comin' Touji's imouto seems pretty adorable: [URL=http://imageshack.us/photo/my-images/18/1353193995976.jpg/] [/URL] mfw ShinjiXSuzuhara OTP With Kaworu headxploded, Asuka gaki'ing him to hell and back and Rei turning out to be creepy space monster once again it's either her or Mari and I think Shinji would prefer her.

[]:             Quote Post by StratoSakuya...AF » Sun Nov 18, 2012 4:32 pm Am I the only one who feels Sakura came straight out of Magical Girl Lyrical Nanoha or Final Fantasy XIII?

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sun Nov 18, 2012 4:41 pm StratoSakuya...AF wrote: Am I the only one who feels Sakura came straight out of Magical Girl Lyrical Nanoha or Final Fantasy XIII?

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Sun Nov 18, 2012 4:43 pm glad to see Nicola advancing in the world

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Sun Nov 18, 2012 4:43 pm I'm going to hate that guy. ><

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Sun Nov 18, 2012 4:44 pm bobbyfischer's ghost wrote: I'm going to hate that guy. ><

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Sun Nov 18, 2012 4:45 pm Xard wrote: That reminds me: does she talk in Kansai-ben too?

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Sun Nov 18, 2012 4:46 pm CJD wrote: I'm going to hate all of them.

[]:             Quote Post by StratoSakuya...AF » Sun Nov 18, 2012 4:49 pm Xard wrote: That reminds me: does she talk in Kansai-ben too? Does anyone who has seen the film remember? This guy looks like a huge douchebag by the way. [URL=http://imageshack.us/photo/my-images/41/evadouchebag.png/] [/URL] Seriously, just look at those expressions.

[]: Re: [SPOILERS] NEW CHARACTERS FAN CLUB HERE YOROSHIKU ^__^             Quote Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Sun Nov 18, 2012 4:50 pm Xard wrote: I'm assuming the title of President Admiral of Green League . Why Green League? Because we all know who the best girl is!

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Sun Nov 18, 2012 4:52 pm fat bald Bridge Guy has the bossest voice at least I think that's him ~20:30

[]:             Quote Post by penguintruth » Sun Nov 18, 2012 4:54 pm I would exchange them all for my beloved Pen Pen. (Characters look more like they're from Eureka Seven than Evangelion .)

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Nov 18, 2012 4:55 pm Sumire wins for me amongst the new characters -- prime cafe-au-lait arm candy. She's gotta be an adult, hasn't she.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sun Nov 18, 2012 4:58 pm @Shinji/Sakura: I thought that if Rei died, it'll be Mari but given that they hardly interacted and what dark turn this has taken, I don't think we will see any romance at all in the rest of Rebuild. Even Asuka is out of the window because she's suddenly twice his age and the looks make no difference given that her being a sort-of adult is still used for drama, for example, she renames him something like "Kid Shinji" Just the mere thought of him ever doing any sort of teenager things again seems inconcievable after all that happened. I can't see him surviving Rebuild anymore. I just can't see how. The survivors from WILLE are probably gonna shoot him on sight.

[]:             Quote Post by amitakartok » Sun Nov 18, 2012 5:03 pm Saku-chan kawaii!! Now seriously, I'm definitely going to use her in my fanfics. Fuck age difference, I'm just gonna age her up into Shinji's age group!

[]:             Quote Post by Kodaemon » Sun Nov 18, 2012 5:05 pm For all intents and purposes, she's older than Shinji now.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sun Nov 18, 2012 5:10 pm Azathoth wrote: glad to see Nicola advancing in the world

[]:             Quote Post by Choo1701 » Sun Nov 18, 2012 5:11 pm Kendrix wrote: The survivors from WILLE are probably gonna shoot him on sight.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Sun Nov 18, 2012 5:14 pm Xard wrote: Nicola who?

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Sun Nov 18, 2012 5:16 pm StratoSakuya...AF wrote: Am I the only one who feels Sakura came straight out of Magical Girl Lyrical Nanoha or Final Fantasy XIII?
